name: S1E7 镜屋猎杀
desc: 陷阱猎人版 · 选项级心理战 24 题（词汇 6 + 语法 14 + 综合 4）

m5.q: The library was so ___ that I could hear my own heartbeat.
m5.why: so＋形容词＋that，空格作 was 的表语需形容词 quiet；quite＝相当（副词），quit＝退出（动词），quietly 是副词不能作表语。

m5.q: Scientists are still studying how rising temperatures ___ ocean life.
m5.why: 从句主语 temperatures（复数）需谓语原形 affect（v. 影响）；effect 是名词（效果），affecting 缺助动词不能单独作谓语。

m5.q: It ___ me three hours to finish the puzzle, but it was worth it.
m5.why: It takes sb. 时间 to do sth. 固定句型；spend 的主语必须是人，cost 不接 to do 作真正主语，pay 接钱。

m5.q: It was ___ a tricky question that even the teacher paused for a moment.
m5.why: 空后是 a＋形＋名，用 such（such a tricky question）；so 需 so tricky a question 语序；very/too 不引导 that 从句。

m5.q: — Would you like some coffee? — Just ___, please. I can't sleep if I drink too much.
m5.why: coffee 不可数且语境是肯定的“来一点”→ a little；a few/few 修饰可数复数；little 表否定“几乎没有”。

m5.q: You may ___ the book for two weeks, but please don't write on it.
m5.why: for＋时间段需延续性动词，keep（持有）可延续；borrow/lend/return 都是瞬间动词，不能接 for two weeks。

m5.q: We ___ each other since we were in primary school, and we're still best friends.
m5.why: since＋still（延续到现在）→ 现在完成时 have known；had known 需要“过去的过去”参照点。

m5.q: — I can't find Lucy anywhere. — Oh, she ___ to the headmaster's office. She'll be back in ten minutes.
m5.why: 现在找不到她＋十分钟后回来＝此刻人不在场 → has gone（去了还没回）；has been＝去过且已回来，正好相反。

m5.q: This bridge ___ over a hundred years ago, but it still carries traffic today.
m5.why: ago 锁定过去时间点＋桥被建造 → 一般过去时被动 was built；完成时不与 ago 连用。

m5.q: A terrible accident ___ at the crossroads last night; luckily no one was hurt.
m5.why: happen 是不及物动词，没有被动语态（假被动陷阱）；last night 锁一般过去。

m5.q: The fireworks ___ at exactly 9 p.m. every National Day, and the whole city watches.
m5.why: 烟花被人燃放 → 短语动词被动 are set off（被动时介词 off 不能丢）；every National Day 锁一般现在。

m5.q: Look! The old theatre ___ into a modern library right now.
m5.why: right now → 进行体；剧院被改造 → 被动；进行＋被动＝is being done；is turning 形似却是主动进行。

m5.q: The new student asked me ___.
ops: that where the computer room was
where is the computer room located on this floor
m5.why: 宾语从句用陈述语序，主句 asked（过去）→ 从句呼应用 was；最长的 D 项语序和时态双错，纯属诱饵。

m5.q: He failed the driving test again, ___ disappointed his whole family.
m5.why: 逗号后指代整个前句的非限定性定语从句只能用 which；that/what 不引导非限定从句，it 缺连词。

m5.q: Don't worry. I'll call you as soon as the meeting ___.
m5.why: 时间状语从句“主将从现”：主句 will call，从句用一般现在 ends；反射性填 will end 正是陷阱。

m5.q: Your sister hardly ever watches TV, ___?
m5.why: hardly 含否定义 → 前否后肯，附加问用肯定式；主句实义动词 watches → 用 does she。

m5.q: Half of the apples on the table ___ already gone bad, so throw them away.
m5.why: half of＋名词，谓语随 of 后名词（apples 复数）→ 复数；gone bad 需 have gone（现在完成）。

m5.q: It was not until midnight ___ the firefighters finally put out the flames.
m5.why: It was not until... that... 是 not until 的强调句固定框架，只能用 that。

m5.q: If I ___ you, I wouldn't trust that stranger so easily.
m5.why: 主句 wouldn't → 与现在事实相反的虚拟语气，be 动词用 were（If I were you 固定）；was 是口语，考试以 were 为准。

m5.q: The population of this town is now three times ___ it was twenty years ago.
m5.why: 倍数表达：N times as＋原级＋as（three times as large as）；as...as 中间用原级不用比较级。

m5.q: In this lucky draw, the chance of winning the grand prize is only one ___ ten thousand.
m5.why: 概率“N 分之一”用 one in N（one in ten thousand＝万分之一）；to 用于比分，of 接复数集合。

m5.q: Not only the students but also the teacher ___ surprised by the announcement yesterday.
m5.why: not only A but also B 谓语就近 B（the teacher 单数）＋yesterday 锁过去 → was；看到 students 反射用复数正是陷阱。

m5.q: My eyes hurt. I ___ at the screen for three hours without a break.
m5.why: for three hours＋一直没停（眼睛疼是持续盯着的结果）→ 现在完成进行时强调持续过程；have stared 强调结果，不如 D 贴切。

m5.q: ___ is no use crying over spilt milk; what matters is what you do next.
m5.why: It is no use doing sth. 固定句型，It 作形式主语；That/This 需有指代对象，There is no use 不成立。
